message:
chore: update Cargo.lock and issue tracker

- Cargo.lock: add fcp-sdk dependency entries for 6 connectors
- .beads/issues.jsonl: refresh issue tracker with current status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

  "futures-util",
  "reqwest 0.13.2",
